title: allium nigrum var. atropurpureum
intro: Allium nigrum var. atropurpureum, also known as black garlic, is a type of plant that belongs to the Allium family, which includes garlic and onions. It is characterized by its dark purple or almost black cloves and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of black garlic include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Black garlic can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and liquid extracts, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
